texto: Ignorance. It claws, tears, and eventually destroys the threads that hold humanity together. These people all around me saying not this, not that…Their tongues untied with the rudeness they fear not to speakTo those they know nothing of, nothing about.Your hair is too tangled, your thighs too fatYour religion, your morals, you can’t possibly believe in that.I do, someone else does too.You are ignorant.
explicacao: Citação de Dani Abarca sobre enfrentar incertezas com ação. “Ignorance. It claws, tears, and eventually destroys the threads that hold humanity together. Thes…” articula motivacao, ignorance, inspiracional em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e inspiracional.
